sqlCommand.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,Flex2) (select '[batchID]',Status,Name from sys.sysusers union select '[batchID]','12',current_user)
update TransX set Flex1 = 'role' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '4'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'user ID' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '12'
update TransX set Flex1 = 'permission' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = '0'
